about.title: About Me

education.title: Education
education.description:
M.Sc.: Applied Mathematics & Computer Science
B.Sc.: Computer Information Systems & Database Management

about.summary: Over 6 years of experience in e-procurement testing. I have expertise in manual testing and automation of UI and API, plus configuring processes in CI/CD. I enjoy watching testing conference videos and am eager and prepared to gain new experiences and knowledge.

0.company: "INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY CENTER" OF THE CHUVASH REPUBLIC
0.description: Provided the operation of telecommunications and computer equipment for the executive authorities and local self-government of the Chuvash Republic.

1.description: Reviewed product requirement documents and functional specifications. Conducted functional testing of the web-application for B2B and B2C in the e-procurement industry. Implemented and maintained manual and automated E2E and integration tests. Demonstrated teamwork by promoting ideas, helping other team members grow their skills.

0.title: Rococo
0.short_description: A microservice-based virtual gallery where users can add artists, museums and paintings. Stack: Spring Boot, REST API, gRPC, Kafka, Selenide, Retrofit, PostgreSQL. Implemented DB, gRPC, API, UI, Kafka autotests and including JUnit Extensions. CI/CD via GitHub Actions.

1.title: Bank
1.short_description: A microservices-based system for financial operations and currency exchange rate retrieval. Stack: Java 21, Kafka, OpenFeign, Swagger, Jackson. Includes Gateway (REST/Kafka), Currency (external API integration), Payment (entity creation), and module with automation Kafka tests.

2.title: Online Store
2.short_description: Automated UI/API Tests for automationexercise.com. Stack: Java 21, Playwright, RestAssured, Allure, Docker. Includes Dockerized execution, Allure reports, and JUnit 5 extensions.

3.title: Online Store (Python)
3.short_description: Automated UI/API Tests for automationexercise.com. Stack: Python 3.13, Pytest, Selene, Httpx, Allure, Docker. Includes Dockerized execution, Allure reports, pytest hooks and fixtures.
